---
title: "Business Source Ultimate"
page-layout: article
---

# Business Source Ultimate

**Provider:** EBSCO

## Description

Comprehensive business database providing scholarly journals, trade publications, industry reports, SWOT analyses, case studies, and company profiles. Supports research across business disciplines.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Scholarly Literature
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Trade & Supply Chain Data
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Trade & Supply Chain Data

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://research-ebsco-com.yale.idm.oclc.org/c/bygvhg/topics)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
